quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: The quiet mind is the canvas where reality is painted.
author: Elena S. Thorne

quote: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Courage is not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: Creativity is intelligence having fun.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: A leader is one who knows the way, goes the way, and shows the way.
author: John C. Maxwell

quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Gratitude turns what we have into enough.
author: Melody Beattie

quote: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: Kindness is a language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Where there is no struggle, there is no strength.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

quote: Hope is being able to see that there is light despite all of the darkness.
author: Desmond Tutu

quote: The secret of change is to focus all of your energy not on fighting the old, but on building the new.
author: Socrates

quote: With self-discipline most anything is possible.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Love is the bridge between you and everything.
author: Rumi

quote: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
author: Buddha

quote: The measure of intelligence is the ability to change.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.
author: Anne Lamott

quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

quote: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
author: John Lennon

quote: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: Imagination is the beginning of creation. You imagine what you desire.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Gratitude is not only the greatest of virtues, but the parent of all others.
author: Marcus Tullius Cicero

quote: The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: No act of kindness, no matter how small, is ever wasted.
author: Aesop

quote: The best revenge is massive success.
author: Frank Sinatra

quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
author: Aristotle

quote: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb
